input: User provided RHDHPLAN-1525 context; creating proposal artifact for RHESS enterprise skills server
SQLite single-replica vs per-replica vs PostgreSQL for DP
output: Single-replica SQLite behind repository interface, same pattern as Backstage. PostgreSQL later for scaling.

input: npx skills CLI has no auth support; conflicts with RBAC requirement
output: Dual mode: authenticated API primary, unauthenticated .well-known/skills opt-in via env var. Flag to PM.

input: Researched npx skills CLI contract from vercel-labs/skills source
output: Two discovery paths: .well-known/agent-skills/ (v0.2.0) and .well-known/skills/ (v0.1.0). Zero auth. Target v0.2.0 skill-md for MVP.

input: How to handle duplicate skill names across sources in .well-known index
output: Prefix with source repo name only on collision. Core model uses (source, slug) composite key. 64-char limit edge case handled at sync.

input: Revised skill identity after researching skills.sh: owner/repo/name is the model
output: Identity is (source, slug) like skills.sh. No prefixing. Duplicate names in .well-known index coexist with unique urls.

input: Search implementation: FTS5 vs Fuse.js for fuzzy search
output: Fuse.js — Jira ticket explicitly requires fuzzy search with ranked results. Small catalog fits in memory.

input: Fuse.js scaling concern: won't work with Postgres or multi-replica
output: Fuse.js behind SearchProvider interface for MVP. Swap to pg_trgm when Postgres arrives. Thin interface, clean migration.

input: Ingestion error handling: all-or-nothing vs best-effort sync
output: Best-effort: index valid skills, return sync report with per-skill success/failure details.

input: Re-sync reconciliation strategy for existing skills
output: Atomic swap: ingest to staging, then delete+insert in single SQLite transaction. No partial state.

input: Web UI authentication mechanism for token-based RBAC
output: Token entry form, stored in localStorage, sent as Bearer header. UI shows admin controls based on role.

input: Where does the RHESS repo live?
output: Target github.com/redhat-ai-dev — confirm with PM. Add to PM flag list alongside auth and SQLite decisions.

input: Git credential handling for private repo cloning
output: Rely on container's native git config. Mount SSH keys/.gitconfig via K8s Secrets. No custom credential mgmt.

input: SKILL.md content storage: SQLite vs filesystem vs object storage
output: SQLite for MVP (metadata+content). Abstract behind SkillRepository. Trajectory: Postgres then OCI registry at enterprise scale.

input: Node.js version and container base image
output: Node.js 24 on ubi9/nodejs-24 with multi-stage build. User corrected stale knowledge.

input: API error response format
output: Structured JSON errors: {error: {code, message}}. Fastify custom error handler.

input: DELETE skill behavior: transient removal vs blocklist vs drop endpoint
output: Blocklist approach: delete marks skill as blocked, sync skips it. Flag to PM — may differ from intended behavior.

input: Which .well-known discovery versions to serve?
output: v0.2.0 only at /.well-known/agent-skills/index.json. No v0.1.0 backward compat.

input: Artifact types for .well-known serving: skill-md only or archive too?
output: Both: skill-md for single-file skills, archive (tar.gz) for multi-file. Generate bundles + SHA256 digests at sync.

input: React UI framework choice
output: PatternFly — Red Hat design system. Visual consistency with RHDH/OpenShift. Built-in table, search, form components.

input: SKILL.md rendering: server-side vs client-side
output: Client-side with react-markdown. API serves raw content + parsed metadata. UI controls presentation.

input: Source identity: admin-provided vs URL-derived
output: Admin-provided kebab-case slug. Internal to RHESS API only, no impact on .well-known/npx compat.

input: PM flag comment posted on RHDHPLAN-1525
output: 4 items flagged: SQLite/single-replica, npx auth gap, repo org, DELETE blocklist. Awaiting PM response.

input: Grill-me session: 20 design decisions resolved
output: Updated design.md with all decisions. 4 items marked pending PM input. Open questions section removed.
